_meta.description: SSoT Ratchet Registry — centralized module patterns (ADR-294)
_meta.howToAdd: Add module entry under 'modules', then run: npm run ssot:baseline

firestore-collections.description: All Firestore collection/doc names must use COLLECTIONS constant

gcs-buckets.description: GCS bucket names and GCP project ID must use gcs-buckets.ts constants

storage-public-upload.description: Server-side publicly-accessible uploads must go through uploadPublicFile(). makePublic() silently no-ops on UBLA-enabled buckets (the new .firebasestorage.app default), making direct storage.googleapis.com URLs return 403. Token-based URLs via firebasestorage.googleapis.com bypass UBLA.

enterprise-id.description: All document IDs must use EnterpriseIdService — no crypto.randomUUID()

domain-constants.description: Entity types, sender types, participant roles must use DOMAIN_CONSTANTS

entity-code-field.description: useEntityCodeSuggestion hook must only be imported/called from EntityCodeField — sealed abstraction (ADR-233). parseFloorLevel utility from the same module is allowed everywhere.

intent-badge-utils.description: Intent/confidence badge variants must use centralized intent-badge-utils

notification-keys.description: Notification i18n keys must be imported from NOTIFICATION_KEYS (SSoT). Domain hooks in src/hooks/notifications/ own the when-to-fire logic. Callers must never hardcode i18n key strings inside notifications.success|error|info|warning() — use a domain hook (useContactNotifications, useProjectNotifications) that references NOTIFICATION_KEYS. Hardcoded Greek/English literals inside those calls are a double violation (SSoT + i18n SOS N.11).

addDoc-prohibition.description: NEVER use addDoc()/.add()/.doc() — always setDoc() with enterprise ID

tenant-company-id.description: Company ID must come from TENANT_COMPANY_ID/getCompanyId() — never hardcoded

deletion-registry.description: Deletion dependencies must be declared in DELETION_REGISTRY — no inline dependency arrays

soft-delete-config.description: Soft-delete entity config must use centralized SOFT_DELETE_CONFIG

entity-code-config.description: Entity type codes (DI/GK/ST/ME/etc) must come from entity-code-config — no hardcoded 2-char codes

openai-provider.description: OpenAI provider creation must use getOpenAIProvider() — no inline createOpenAI() calls outside the SSoT module

ai-role-access-matrix.description: AI role permissions must use AI_ROLE_ACCESS_MATRIX — no inline access configs

environment-security.description: Security policies must use ENVIRONMENT_SECURITY_CONFIG — no inline security rules

file-upload-limits.description: File size limits must come from FILE_TYPE_CONFIG — no hardcoded byte calculations

file-type-classification.description: AI classification + preview + body-text extraction decisions for file types must go through classification-registry.ts (ADR-296). Before ADR-296 the same MIME list lived hand-synchronised in three places (route.ts, useFileClassification.ts, preview-registry.ts) and drift caused ~10 fix commits on 2026-04-21. Forbidden patterns (below): (1) re-declaring CLASSIFIABLE_TYPES / CLASSIFIABLE_EXTS / IMAGE_MIME_TYPES / TEXT_MIME_TYPES / DXF_EXTENSIONS outside the registry — every consumer must import `isAIClassifiable`, `getPreviewType`, `getFileCategory`, `getMediaDocumentType`, or `getExtractorKind`. (2) re-declaring the DOCX_MIME / XLSX_MIME / DXF_MIMES / SVG_MIME constants that used to drive the extractor switch — dispatch goes through `getExtractorKind` + `runExtractor`.

showcase-core.description: Public-showcase orchestration (PDF pipeline, email pipeline, public payload/PDF routes, snapshot builder, share resolver, email builder, PDF service+renderer) must use the showcase-core factories (ADR-321). New showcase surfaces must delegate to createShowcasePdfRoute, createShowcaseEmailRoute, createPublicShowcasePayloadRoute, createPublicShowcasePdfRoute, createShowcaseSnapshotBuilder, createShowcaseShareResolver, createShowcaseEmailBuilder, ShowcasePDFService, BaseShowcaseRenderer from src/services/showcase-core/ — not reimplement the orchestration.

notification-events.description: Notification events/channels/severities must use centralized registry

project-mutation-impact.description: Project mutation fields/guards must use PROJECT_MUTATION_* constants

ai-pipeline-config.description: Pipeline queue/timeout/confidence configs must use PIPELINE_*_CONFIG constants

feature-flags.description: Feature flags must use APP_FEATURE_FLAGS/isAppFeatureEnabled — no inline flag objects

business-hours.description: Business hours/slots must use BUSINESS_HOURS config — no hardcoded scheduling values

audit-tracked-fields.description: Audit trail field definitions must use *_TRACKED_FIELDS from centralized config

entity-audit-trail.description: Entity audit trail is a closed SSoT (ADR-195 Phase 10). Server writes go through EntityAuditService.recordChange(). Client reads go through EntityAuditClientService.subscribeGlobal()/subscribeEntity(), which compose firestoreQueryService. The canonical hooks are useEntityAudit + useGlobalAuditTrail. Forbidden (reader-side, enforced by regex below): direct writes to entity_audit_trail, inline collection() queries on ENTITY_AUDIT_TRAIL, re-implementation of either hook, manual RealtimeService event lists like GLOBAL_AUDIT_WATCH_EVENTS/ENTITY_EVENT_MAP, or bypassing firestoreQueryService with raw onSnapshot on the collection. Writer-side coverage (positive requirement — any write to a tracked entity must also call recordChange) is enforced by CHECK 3.17 via scripts/check-entity-audit-coverage.js + .entity-audit-coverage-baseline.json. The two together guarantee the audit trail is both untamperable (reader gate) and complete (writer gate).

dxf-raster-generator.description: Server-side DXF scene → PNG rasterisation (ADR-312 Phase 3). Canonical entry point for every surface that needs a DXF thumbnail: Cloud Function trigger (functions/src/storage/dxf-thumbnail-onfinalize.ts), migration endpoint (/api/admin/migrate-dxf-thumbnails), and any future reader. Uses @resvg/resvg-js (pure WASM) to stay serverless-safe. Inline `new Resvg(...)` outside the allowlist = forbidden: we must not scatter SVG→PNG calls across the codebase, or the thumbnail size/background/padding drift from the browser-side DXF Viewer. The functions/shared mirror is the SSoT mirror kept byte-for-byte in sync.

decode-processed-dxf-json.description: gzip-aware decoder for `.dxf.processed.json` payloads (ADR-033 writer uses pako.gzip). Any server-side consumer of the processed JSON must go through this helper so the gzip magic-byte handling stays in one place. Regression pin: 2026-04-18 — the initial ADR-312 Phase 3 back-fill assumed plain UTF-8 and failed on every existing processed file. The functions/shared mirror is kept byte-for-byte in sync.

dxf-thumbnail-selfheal.description: Server-side self-heal orchestrator for the DXF→thumbnail pipeline (ADR-312 Phase 7.3). ensureDxfThumbnail(fileId) is the single entry point for any request-path code that needs to nudge a DXF through the missing pipeline stage (`.processed.json` generation via processDxf + FileRecord patch, or direct rasterize via rasterizeDxfThumbnail). Used fire-and-forget by the public showcase route on each linked parking/storage DXF, and synchronously by the back-fill endpoint helpers. Forbidden elsewhere: inline ensureProcessedDataForDxf / rasterizeDxfThumbnail reimplementations — every new consumer must import from this module.

property-media-reader.description: Reading property-linked media (photos, floorplans) from the `files` collection on the server must go through PropertyMediaService (listPropertyMedia / downloadPropertyMedia / countPropertyMedia). The service centralises the canonical filter set (companyId + entityType=property + entityId + category), active-lifecycle pruning, createdAt sorting, and jsPDF mime allowlisting for server-side PDF embedding. Forbidden: inline `.collection(COLLECTIONS.FILES).where('entityType','==','property')...` pipelines outside the service — each duplicate is a chance for tenant-isolation or lifecycle drift. ADR-312 (Property Showcase), ADR-031 (File Storage).

firestore-realtime.description: Firestore realtime subscriptions must go through one of the two canonical layers: (1) firestoreQueryService.subscribe/subscribeDoc/subscribeSubcollection (ADR-214) for tenant-aware tenant-filtered reads — PRIMARY path, (2) RealtimeService.subscribeToCollection/subscribeToDocument (ADR-195 Phase 8) for raw wrapping + event bus dispatch. Direct onSnapshot() calls from firebase/firestore are forbidden outside these layers. Legacy scattered callers are in the baseline and will ratchet down as they get migrated — preferred migration target is firestoreQueryService because it auto-injects companyId/tenantId filters.

firestore-schema-map.description: AI schema definitions must use FIRESTORE_SCHEMA_MAP — no inline schema objects

commercial-statuses.description: Commercial statuses must import from @/constants/commercial-statuses — no inline re-declaration

operational-statuses.description: Operational statuses must import from @/constants/operational-statuses — no inline re-declaration

energy-classes.description: Energy classes must import from @/constants/energy-classes — no inline re-declaration

building-types.description: Building types must import from @/constants/building-types — no inline re-declaration

building-statuses.description: Building statuses must import from @/constants/building-statuses — no inline re-declaration

project-statuses.description: Project statuses must import from @/constants/project-statuses — no inline re-declaration

project-types.description: Project types must import from @/constants/project-types — no inline re-declaration

priority-levels.description: Priority levels must import from @/constants/priority-levels — no inline re-declaration

renovation-statuses.description: Renovation statuses must import from @/constants/renovation-statuses — no inline re-declaration

property-types.description: Property types must import from @/constants/property-types — no inline re-declaration

contact-types.description: Contact types must import from @/constants/contact-types — no inline re-declaration

entity-status-values.description: Entity/queue status objects must import from @/constants/entity-status-values — no inline re-declaration

legal-phases.description: Legal phases must import from @/constants/legal-phases — no inline re-declaration

greek-banks.description: Greek bank data must import from @/constants/greek-banks — no inline re-declaration

triage-statuses.description: Triage statuses must import from @/constants/triage-statuses — no inline re-declaration

property-features-enterprise.description: Property feature enums (Orientation, ViewType, etc) must import from @/constants/property-features-enterprise

archive-feedback.description: Archive result feedback must use showArchiveResultFeedback() — no inline archive toast logic

file-download.description: User file downloads (FileRecord from Storage) must use useFileDownload hook — no window.open or inline anchor.download. Generated exports (PDF/CSV/Excel/ZIP/PNG/IFC/TXT) belong to the export-file module (Domain B).

export-file.description: Generated file exports (PDF/CSV/Excel/ZIP/PNG/IFC/TXT/GeoJSON) must use triggerExportDownload() or openBlobInNewTab() from src/lib/exports/trigger-export-download. Do NOT re-implement local downloadBlob/triggerDownload helpers.

storage-path-construction.description: Storage paths must use buildStoragePath() — no hardcoded companies/${id}/... paths

entity-creation-manual.description: Entity creation must use createEntity() — no manual createdBy: user.uid/auth.uid assembly

search-index-config.description: Search index definitions must use SEARCH_INDEX_CONFIG — no inline search configs

ai-analysis-config.description: AI schemas/prompts/costs must use centralized ai-analysis-config — no inline AI configs

admin-tool-definitions.description: Admin AI tool definitions must use centralized admin-tool-definitions — no inline tool configs

persona-config.description: Persona metadata/sections must use centralized persona-config — no inline persona definitions

firestore-field-constants.description: Firestore field names must use FIELDS constant — no inline redefinition

media-constants.description: Avatar/media URLs must use centralized media-constants — no hardcoded placeholder URLs

file-upload-config.description: Upload limits/configs must use centralized file-upload-config — no inline upload definitions

boq-categories.description: BOQ master categories must use centralized boq-categories — no inline category definitions

construction-templates.description: Construction phases/tasks must use centralized templates — no inline phase definitions

individual-config.description: Individual form sections must use centralized individual-config — no inline section definitions

photo-compression-config.description: Compression profiles must use centralized config — no inline compression definitions

procurement-units.description: Procurement units must use centralized config — no inline unit definitions

environment-security-policies.description: Security policies must use centralized config — no inline policy definitions

legal-procedures-kb.description: Legal procedures must use centralized KB — no inline procedure definitions

payment-plan-templates.description: Payment plans must use centralized templates — no inline milestone definitions

study-groups-config.description: Study groups must use centralized config — no inline group definitions

versioning-config.description: Versioning constants must use centralized config — no inline version definitions

toast-config.description: Toast timing constants must use centralized config — no inline duration values

property-statuses-enterprise.description: Property status labels must import from centralized constants — no inline re-declaration

role-mappings-config.description: Role mappings must use centralized config — no inline role mapping definitions

address-config.description: Address configuration must use centralized config — no inline address definitions

company-config.description: Company sections must use centralized config — no inline section definitions

geographic-config.description: Geographic config must use centralized config — no inline geographic definitions

auto-save-config.description: Auto-save timing must use centralized config — no inline timing definitions

file-preview-registry.description: File preview type/category detection must use preview-registry — no inline categorizeFile/getPreviewType/getFileCategory declarations

cron-auth.description: Vercel Cron authorization must use centralized verifyCronAuthorization — no inline CRON_SECRET checks

modules._comment_tier8: === TIER 8: ADR-314 PHASE A — CORE SSoT MODULES (2026-04-18) ===

enterprise-id-convenience.description: All generate*Id() named functions must be declared ONLY in enterprise-id.service.ts (core) or enterprise-id-convenience.ts (barrel). No local wrappers/duplicates. Allowlist covers the sealed SSoT set + the React hook barrel (useEnterpriseIds) + the server-side composite-key ID generators (id-generation.ts — different purpose). ADR-314 Phase A.

intl-formatting.description: Intl API wrappers (formatDate/formatDateTime/formatRelativeTime/formatCurrency/formatNumber/formatPercentage/formatPriceWithUnit/formatList/sortByLocale/compareByLocale/isRTLLocale/getTextDirection) must be declared ONLY in intl-formatting.ts. Phase A baseline freezes scattered local formatters; Phase B/C migrate callers. ADR-314 Phase A.

intl-domain.description: Domain-specific Intl wrappers (formatFloorLabel/formatFloorString/getCategoryLabel/getStatusLabel/getPricePerSqmUnit/formatDateShort/formatDateLong/formatDateForDisplay/formatDateGreek/formatCurrencyWhole/formatCurrencyCompact/getDaysUntilCompletion/formatFlexibleDateTime/formatFlexibleDate/formatFlexibleTimeOnly) must be declared ONLY in intl-domain.ts. ADR-314 Phase A.

date-local.description: Date normalization + ISO/millis conversion canonical module. Blocks: (a) re-declaration of normalizeToDate/normalizeToISO/fieldToISO/normalizeToMillis/getNestedTimestampISO/toLocalDateInputValue/combineLocalDateTime; (b) scattered new Date().toISOString() — migrated to nowISO() in Phase C.1; (c) scattered Timestamp.fromDate(new Date()) — migrated to nowTimestamp() in Phase C.2. Baseline freezes current 309 + 19 legacy occurrences. ADR-314 Phase A + C.

design-system.description: Design system helpers (getTypographyClass/getSpacingClass/getComponentSizeClass/getInteractiveStateClass/getGridClass/getShadowClass/getBorderRadiusClass/getResponsiveClass/getStatusBadgeClass/getFormFieldClass) must be declared ONLY in design-system.ts. NOTE: getStatusColor in design-system is the SEMANTIC-TOKEN variant (success/error/info → CSS vars); the DOMAIN-STATUS variant lives in status-helpers (ADR-314 Phase B) and is enforced separately. Allowlist covers the canonical re-alias site in property-status-core.

modules._comment_tier8_phaseB: === TIER 8 cont. — ADR-314 PHASE B (2026-04-18): canonical domain status SSoT ===

status-helpers.description: Domain-aware status helpers — getStatusColor(domain, status, opts)/getStatusLabel(domain, status, opts)/getStatusIcon(domain, status) — discriminated union over StatusDomain ('storage'|'obligation'|'lead'|'communication'|'buildingTimeline'|'buildingProject'|'project'|'property'). Canonical SSoT for ALL exported domain status helpers; previously scattered across obligations-utils.ts, project-utils.ts (deleted), leads/utils/formatters.ts (deleted), projects/structure-tab/utils/status.ts (deleted), and 4 component-local copies. The semantic-token variant (success/error/info) remains in design-system.ts (orthogonal namespace, allowlisted). Property-status alias in property-status-core.ts is allowlisted (canonical alias for the property domain, ADR-287 precedent). Pattern matches EXPORTED declarations only — local component-internal const/function with same name is permitted (not a SSoT duplicate). ADR-314 Phase B.

unified-sharing-service.description: All sharing logic (token lifecycle, validation, access-count, revocation, listing) MUST route through UnifiedSharingService. Direct reads/writes on COLLECTIONS.SHARES or the literal 'shares' collection from other modules are forbidden. Re-implementation of createShare/validateShare/verifyPassword semantics outside src/services/sharing/ is a SSoT violation. FileShareService on file_shares remains operational (legacy) and is NOT subject to this module. Scheduled retirement in ADR-315 Phase M5. ADR-315 Phase M1.

channel-dispatch-service.description: All outbound share dispatches (email / telegram / whatsapp / messenger / instagram) MUST write an audit record in `share_dispatches` via ChannelDispatchService. Direct reads/writes on COLLECTIONS.SHARE_DISPATCHES from other modules are forbidden. Re-implementing dispatch-logging semantics outside src/services/sharing/ is a SSoT violation. ADR-315 Phase M3.

project-showcase-service.description: All server-side project showcase snapshot construction MUST route through buildProjectShowcaseSnapshot() in snapshot-builder.ts. Direct Firestore reads of the projects collection for showcase purposes, inline branding resolution, and re-implementation of the snapshot-to-PDF pipeline outside src/services/project-showcase/ are forbidden. PDF rendering via ProjectShowcasePDFService + ProjectShowcaseRenderer. Public API: GET /api/project-showcase/[token]. PDF API: POST /api/projects/[id]/showcase/pdf. ADR-316.

description-notes-card.description: Paired description+notes textareas on entity info tabs (storage, parking, future units/offices) MUST render via DescriptionNotesCard. Inline re-implementation of the pattern (Card wrapper with two Textarea fields bound to description+notes fields of a form state) is forbidden. Keeps the Card/Textarea layout and the StickyNote/violet styling consistent across entities. ADR-194.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD1: === ADR-314 PHASE D.1 (2026-04-19): registry gap reduction — 6 high-export SSoT modules ===

message-utils.description: HTML sanitization with DOMPurify (XSS protection, OWASP A03:2021). Telegram/email tag allowlists, Email signature detection (ADR-072/ADR-073). Re-implementation of sanitizeHTML/sanitizeEmailHTML/formatMessageHTML/stripHTMLTags/detectEmailSignature/stripEmailSignature outside message-utils.ts = security hole (divergent sanitization rules = XSS bypass). ADR-314 Phase D.1.

firebase-admin.description: Firebase Admin SDK singleton accessors (ADR-077). Every server-side Firestore/Auth/Storage read/write MUST go through getAdminFirestore/getAdminAuth/getAdminStorage/getAdminBucket. Re-implementation of these accessors outside the module breaks the lazy singleton + credential chain (B64 -> JSON -> ADC) and risks double-initialisation / bucket drift. ADR-314 Phase D.1.

npv-engine.description: NPV / cash-flow math for the Interest Cost Calculator (ADR-234 SPEC-234E). Pure functions, zero side effects, runs on client + server. Re-implementation of calculateDiscountFactor/calculateNPV/calculateCashFlowAnalysis/calculateWACP/calculateTimeCost/calculateRecommendedPrice/calculateFullResult/buildComparisonScenarios outside this module forks the financial model (certainty multipliers, discount factors, time-cost formula). ADR-314 Phase D.1.

hedging-engine.description: Interest-rate hedging strategy math (Floating/Swap/Cap/Collar) for SPEC-242E Hedging Simulator (ADR-242). Pure math, zero side effects. Re-implementation of calculateFloatingCost/calculateSwapCost/calculateCapCost/calculateCollarCost/compareHedgingStrategies/findBreakEvenRate/risingScenario/flatScenario/decliningScenario forks the risk model. ADR-314 Phase D.1.

pagination.description: Firestore cursor-based pagination primitives — applyPagination/processPaginationResult/createPaginationState/updatePaginationState/calculatePaginationMetrics + InfiniteScrollPagination/PageBasedPagination classes. Every paginated Firestore read must go through this module to keep limit()/startAfter()/cursor semantics consistent (prevents N+1 queries, enforces MAX_PAGE_SIZE guard). ADR-314 Phase D.1.

rtl-utils.description: RTL (right-to-left) locale-aware helpers for bidirectional text and layout support. useRTL hook, containsRTLCharacters detection, bidiIsolate wrapping, formatRTLCurrency, sortRTL, generateRTLCSSVars + rtlClasses/rtlStyles/rtlIcon/rtlAnimation/rtlKeyboard/logicalProperties objects. Re-implementation fragments the RTL semantics (Arabic/Hebrew/Farsi) across the app. ADR-314 Phase D.1.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD2: === ADR-314 PHASE D.2 (2026-04-19): registry gap reduction — 4 config/tabs-config SSoT modules ===

properties-tabs-config.description: Properties (units) tabs configuration — factory-based via unified-tabs-factory.ts. Canonical data + utility functions + deprecated aliases (UNITS_TABS, getSortedUnitsTabs, etc.). Re-implementation of PROPERTIES_TABS/getSortedPropertiesTabs/getEnabledPropertiesTabs outside this file forks tab ordering, enabled state, and validation logic. ADR-314 Phase D.2.

period-selector-config.description: PeriodSelector periods configuration — single source of truth for day/week/month/year period definitions. Re-implementation of PERIOD_SELECTOR_PERIODS or getSortedPeriods/getEnabledPeriods outside this file forks period ordering and enablement. ADR-314 Phase D.2.

crm-dashboard-tabs-config.description: CRM Dashboard tabs configuration — single source of truth for overview/pipeline/communications/tasks/calendar tabs. Re-implementation of CRM_DASHBOARD_TABS or getSortedCRMDashboardTabs/getEnabledCRMDashboardTabs outside this file forks tab order and component routing. ADR-314 Phase D.2.

building-tabs-config.description: Building tabs configuration — factory-based via unified-tabs-factory.ts. Canonical accessor functions with module-level cache (getSortedBuildingTabs). Re-implementation of BUILDING_TABS or getSortedBuildingTabs/getEnabledBuildingTabs outside this file forks building tab definitions. ADR-314 Phase D.2.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD1b: === ADR-314 PHASE D.1b (2026-04-19): D.1 residual — validation, share-utils, smart-navigation-factory ===

validation.description: Centralized Zod validation rules, schemas, and resolvers. validationRules object, commonSchemas, passwordSchema, createFormSchema, formatZodErrors, createValidationResolver, validateDocumentDates, createContactValidationSchema. Re-implementation forks validation logic (field rules, error messages, contact type schemas). ADR-314 Phase D.1b.

share-utils.description: Web Share API + clipboard + URL generation + social share URLs SSoT. isWebShareSupported, shareContent, copyToClipboard, generateShareableURL, shareProperty, getSocialShareUrls, getPhotoSocialShareUrls, trackShareEvent. social-platform-system wrappers (class-backed SharingService) are allowlisted as legitimate adapters. ADR-314 Phase D.1b.

smart-navigation-factory.description: Navigation config factory — createNavigationConfig, getNavigationStats, validateNavigationConfig, findNavigationItemByPath, createMainMenuItems, createToolsMenuItems, createSettingsMenuItems, debugNavigationFactory. Re-implementation forks menu structure, item priorities, and environment-based filtering. ADR-314 Phase D.1b.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD2c: === ADR-314 PHASE D.2c (2026-04-19): registry gap — unified-tabs-factory root ===

unified-tabs-factory.description: Enterprise tabs smart factory — root of all 8 *-tabs-config modules. createTabsConfig/getSortedTabs/getTabById/getTabByValue/getDefaultTab/validateTabConfig/getTabsStats/getTabsForEnvironment + UnifiedTabConfig/TabEntityType types. Re-implementation forks tab creation logic for all entity types (properties/storage/building/contact/project/crm-dashboard/parking). ADR-314 Phase D.2c.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD2b: === ADR-314 PHASE D.2b (2026-04-19): registry gap reduction — 4 more tabs-config SSoT modules ===

contact-tabs-config.description: Contact tabs configuration — factory-based via unified-tabs-factory.ts with ContactType conditional logic (individual/company/service). Blocks CONTACT_TABS + ContactTabsConfig + all accessor/validation/debug functions. Re-implementation forks per-type tab filtering. ADR-314 Phase D.2b.

parking-tabs-config.description: Parking tabs configuration — factory-based via unified-tabs-factory.ts. Blocks PARKING_TABS + accessor/validation functions (getSortedParkingTabs, getParkingTabById, getDefaultParkingTab, validateParkingTabConfig, getAvailableParkingComponents, getParkingTabsForEnvironment). ADR-314 Phase D.2b.

project-tabs-config.description: Project tabs configuration — inline config (non-factory), 16 tabs covering general/locations/structure/ownership/engineers/brokers/customers/timeline/ika/floorplan/parking/measurements/documents/photos/videos/history. Blocks PROJECT_TABS + all accessor functions. ADR-314 Phase D.2b.

storage-tabs-config.description: Storage (αποθήκη) tabs configuration — factory-based via unified-tabs-factory.ts. Blocks STORAGE_TABS + accessor/validation functions (getSortedStorageTabs, getStorageTabById, getDefaultStorageTab, validateStorageTabConfig, getAvailableStorageComponents, getStorageTabsForEnvironment). ADR-314 Phase D.2b.

accessibility.description: Accessibility utilities — FOCUSABLE_ELEMENTS_SELECTOR, getFocusableElements, focusFirstElement, focusLastElement, useFocusTrap, useArrowNavigation. Canonical SSoT for keyboard/focus management and ARIA navigation helpers. ADR-314 Phase D.3e.

preload-routes.description: Route preloading utilities — preloadRoute, preloadRoutes, preloadUserRoutes, preloadOnHover, useRoutePreload. Canonical SSoT for Next.js route prefetch strategy. ADR-314 Phase D.3e.

enterprise-icon-migration.description: Enterprise icon migration tooling — ICON_MIGRATION_PATTERNS, generateIconSizesImport, generateHookDeclaration, replaceIconClass, validateMigrationSafety. Canonical SSoT for automated hardcoded-icon → useIconSizes migration. ADR-314 Phase D.3e.

field-extractors.description: Firestore document field extractors — getString, getNumber, getBoolean, getArray (all overloaded with optional defaultValue). Canonical SSoT for safe typed extraction from raw Firestore DataRecord maps. ADR-314 Phase D.3e.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD3d: === ADR-314 PHASE D.3d (2026-04-19): registry gap — waterfall/firestore-mappers/sensitivity engines ===

waterfall-engine.description: Waterfall distribution engine — calculateWaterfall + PRESET_STANDARD_80_20/PRESET_JV_CATCH_UP/PRESET_SIMPLE_SPLIT preset configs. Canonical SSoT for real-estate JV profit waterfall calculations. ADR-314 Phase D.3d.

firestore-mappers.description: Firestore document mappers — isValidStorageType, isValidStorageStatus, mapStorageDoc, mapParkingDoc. Canonical SSoT for raw Firestore data → typed domain model conversion (Storage + ParkingSpot). ADR-314 Phase D.3d.

sensitivity-engine.description: Financial sensitivity analysis engine — applyVariablePerturbation, runTornadoAnalysis, buildHeatMap. Canonical SSoT for tornado/heat-map sensitivity analysis on financial models. ADR-314 Phase D.3d.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD3c: === ADR-314 PHASE D.3c (2026-04-19): registry gap — financial/construction engine SSoT modules ===

counterproposal-engine.description: Counterproposal financial engine — buildCounterproposalCashFlows, calculateCounterproposalScenario, runCounterproposalAnalysis, calculateSliderScenario. Canonical SSoT for loan counterproposal cash-flow modeling. ADR-314 Phase D.3c.

dscr-engine.description: DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) engine — getDSCRStatus, calculateDSCR, runStressTest, findMaxRateForDSCR. Canonical SSoT for mortgage stress-test and DSCR calculations. ADR-314 Phase D.3c.

forward-curve-engine.description: Euribor forward-curve engine — extractSpotRates, deriveForwardRates, detectCurveShape, buildForwardCurveResult. Canonical SSoT for interest-rate curve modeling. ADR-314 Phase D.3c.

draw-schedule-engine.description: Construction draw-schedule engine — analyzeDrawSchedule, getGreekConstructionTemplate. Canonical SSoT for Greek construction phase payment scheduling. ADR-314 Phase D.3c.

error-mapping.description: Domain error → i18n mapping SSoT — mapErrorToI18n, getAllErrorMappings, registerErrorMapping, mapHttpStatusToError. DomainError/ErrorMapping interfaces. Canonical SSoT for structured error presentation. ADR-314 Phase D.3b.

geometry.description: SVG/2D geometry primitives — getCentroid (polygon centroid), distanceToLineSegment (point-to-segment distance). Re-export in ConnectionElements.tsx uses `export { X }` form — not matched by `export const` pattern. ADR-314 Phase D.3b.

admin-batch-utils.description: Firestore batch operation utilities — BATCH_SIZE_READ (500)/BATCH_SIZE_WRITE (200) constants, processClientBatch<T>/processAdminBatch<T> async processors. Canonical SSoT for chunked Firestore reads/writes. ADR-314 Phase D.3b.

layer-sync.description: DXF layer sync SSoT — LayerSyncManager class, useLayerSync hook, createGlobalLayerSync factory, forceSyncLayers async. Canonical SSoT for RealtimeService-backed layer synchronization (ADR-314 Phase C.5.2 — migrated from raw onSnapshot to RealtimeService). ADR-314 Phase D.3b.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD3a: === ADR-314 PHASE D.3a (2026-04-19): registry gap — utility SSoT modules (array-utils/type-guards/greek-text/json-utils/coords) ===

array-utils.description: Generic array utilities — chunkArray<T>(array, size). Canonical SSoT for array partitioning. Re-exports in report-query-transforms.ts and firestore/utils.ts use { X } form (not function declarations) — not caught by pattern. ADR-314 Phase D.3a.

type-guards.description: TypeScript runtime type predicates — isRecord, isNonEmptyString, isNonEmptyTrimmedString, isNonEmptyArray. Canonical SSoT for typed narrowing utilities. ADR-314 Phase D.3a.

greek-text.description: Greek text processing utilities — stripAccents, normalizeGreekText, toGreekTitleCase, normalizeForSearch. Canonical SSoT for Greek locale text ops. ai-pipeline/greek-text-utils.ts converted to re-export form (Phase C.5.46). normalizeForSearch excluded from patterns (also in file-display-name-utils, different domain). ADR-314 Phase D.3a.

json-utils.description: Safe JSON parsing utilities — safeJsonParse<T>(input, fallback), safeJsonParseWith<T>(input, schema). Canonical SSoT for typed JSON deserialization with fallbacks. ADR-314 Phase D.3a.

coords.description: SVG coordinate utilities for DXF viewer — getZoomFrom, getPanFrom, toSvgPointFromMouse. Canonical SSoT for SVG viewport coordinate transforms (zoom/pan/mouse-to-SVG-point). Distinct from hooks/utils/coords.ts which exports getZoomFromEl/toSvgPoint (different signatures). ADR-314 Phase D.3a.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD3f: === ADR-314 PHASE D.3f (2026-04-19): registry gap — top-level lib/config SSoT modules (monte-carlo/firebase-server/stale-cache/contact-dependency/navigation) ===

monte-carlo-engine.description: Monte Carlo simulation engine — runMonteCarloSimulation. Canonical SSoT for probabilistic financial modelling via Monte Carlo methods. ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

firebase-server.description: Server-side Firebase initialization — firebaseServer object (app, auth, db, storage). Canonical SSoT for server-side Firebase SDK instance. ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

stale-cache.description: Stale-while-revalidate cache utility — createStaleCache<T>. Canonical SSoT for namespace-keyed in-memory stale cache with TTL. ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

contact-dependency-registry.description: Contact dependency impact registry — CONTACT_DEPENDENCY_REGISTRY, getDependenciesForScenario, getScenarioMode, deriveDeletionDependencies. Canonical SSoT for contact deletion/mutation impact analysis (block/warn/info scenarios). ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

navigation-config.description: Navigation menu configuration — mainMenuItems, toolsMenuItems, settingsMenuItem, getMainMenuItems, getToolsMenuItems, getSettingsMenuItems. Canonical SSoT for app navigation structure. ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

contact-info-config.description: Contact info configuration — CONTACT_INFO singleton, ContactInfoUtils object. Canonical SSoT for contact display/format configuration (phone/email/address patterns). ADR-314 Phase D.3j.

profession-bridge.description: Profession/role bridge registry — PROJECT_ROLE_BRIDGE, getBridgeEntry. Canonical SSoT for mapping project roles to profession metadata (i18n keys, icons, categories). ADR-314 Phase D.3j.

persona-removal-guards.description: Persona removal guard — checkPersonaRemovalGuard async function. Canonical SSoT for pre-deletion persona dependency checks across collections. ADR-314 Phase D.3j.

sidebar-utils.description: Sidebar badge variant utility — getBadgeVariant(badge). Canonical SSoT for mapping sidebar item states to Radix/shadcn badge variant strings. ADR-314 Phase D.3j.

building-features-i18n.description: Building features i18n utilities — FEATURE_GREEK_TO_KEY registry, getBuildingFeatureKey, translateBuildingFeature. Canonical SSoT for Greek↔key mapping of building amenity/feature labels. ADR-314 Phase D.3j.

override-guard.description: Feature override guard utilities — isOverrideOn, guardGlobalAccess, guardWithCanary<T>, enableForceOverride, disableForceOverride. Canonical SSoT for canary/override access control in dev/staging environments. ADR-314 Phase D.3i.

pending-relationship-guard.description: Pending relationship guard — PendingRelationshipGuard object (canProceed, getBlockingMessage, hasBlockingRelationships). Canonical SSoT for entity mutation guards when pending relationships exist. ADR-314 Phase D.3i.

section-field-utils.description: Section field utilities — ARRAY_FIELD_SECTIONS registry, extractRealFieldIds(section). Canonical SSoT for mapping entity sections to their real field IDs (strips virtual/computed fields). ADR-314 Phase D.3i.

property-normalizer.description: Property document normalization — normalizeProperty, validatePropertyCompleteness, preparePropertyForFirestore, getPropertyDisplaySummary. Canonical SSoT for PropertyDoc↔PropertyModel conversion and Firestore serialization. ADR-314 Phase D.3i.

file-validation.description: File upload validation utilities — validateFile, validateFileExtension, validateFileMimeType, validateFileSize, validateImageFile, formatFileSize. Canonical SSoT for client-side file validation before upload. ADR-314 Phase D.3i.

firestore-now.description: Firestore server timestamp utility — nowTimestamp() → Timestamp. Canonical SSoT for Firestore Timestamp.fromDate(new Date()) pattern. ADR-314 Phase D.3h.

toast-presets.description: Toast notification presets — toastPresets object (success/error/warning/info variants). Canonical SSoT for standardized toast notification configurations. ADR-314 Phase D.3h.

firestore-helpers.description: Firestore query helpers — sanitizeDocumentId, normalizeProjectIdForQuery. Canonical SSoT for Firestore document ID sanitization and project ID normalization for queries. ADR-314 Phase D.3h.

form-error-handler.description: Form error handling utilities — useFormErrorHandler hook, createErrorMessage, errorMessages, createValidationResult<T>. Canonical SSoT for structured form validation error display and severity classification. ADR-314 Phase D.3h.

service-config.description: Service section/field configuration — SERVICE_SECTIONS, getServiceSortedSections, getServiceSectionById, getAllServiceFields. Canonical SSoT for service entity field layout and section ordering. ADR-314 Phase D.3h.

safe-fire-and-forget.description: Fire-and-forget async utilities — safeFireAndForget (server-safe), clientSafeFireAndForget (client-only with error boundary). Canonical SSoT for non-awaited async side-effects with structured error handling. ADR-314 Phase D.3g.

firestore-sanitize.description: Firestore data sanitization utilities — sanitizeForFirestore<T>, stripUndefinedDeep<T>, stripNullValues. Canonical SSoT for stripping undefined/null values before Firestore writes. Note: accounting/repository/firestore-helpers.ts re-exports via `export { X }` form — allowlisted. ADR-314 Phase D.3g.

collection-utils.description: Generic collection aggregation utilities — groupByKey<T>, tallyBy<T>, sumByKey<T>, sumBy<T>, countBy<T>. Canonical SSoT for array grouping/tallying/summing. Note: hooks/useEntityStats.ts re-exports via `export { X }` form — not caught by function-declaration patterns. rate/avg/avgRounded excluded (duplicated elsewhere). ADR-314 Phase D.3g.

toggle-select.description: Generic multi-select toggle utility — toggleSelect<T extends { id? }>(items, item). Canonical SSoT for immutable add/remove toggle on arrays of identifiable items. ADR-314 Phase D.3g.

error-utils.description: Error message extraction utility — getErrorMessage(error: unknown, fallback). Canonical SSoT for safe unknown→string error coercion (Error.message, string passthrough, fallback). ADR-314 Phase D.3g.

modules._comment_adr314_phaseD3f_firestore: === ADR-314 PHASE D.3f.2 (2026-04-19): registry gap — firestore cascade/impact/entity (subdirectory, informational only — not scanner-visible) ===

cascade-propagation.description: Firestore cascade propagation SSoT — propagateBuildingProjectLink, propagateProjectCompanyLink, propagatePropertyBuildingLink, propagateChildBuildingLink, propagateSpaceAllocationCodeChange. Canonical SSoT for cross-entity field cascade operations. ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

contact-impact-engine.description: Contact dependency impact engine — computeContactImpact, findDependencyCount. Canonical SSoT for computing cross-collection contact impact before mutations. ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

entity-creation-types.description: Entity creation registry and types — ENTITY_REGISTRY, EntityRegistryEntry, EntityCreationParams, EntityCreationResult, ServerEntityType, EntityHierarchy, EntityIdGeneratorName. Canonical SSoT for server-side entity type definitions and creation metadata. ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

entity-linking-types.description: Entity linking registry and types — LINK_REGISTRY, LinkRegistryEntry, LinkCascadeType, LinkEntityParams, LinkEntityResult. Canonical SSoT for Firestore entity-link cascade metadata (distinct from services/entity-linking/types.ts which is UI-layer). ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

firestore-auth-context.description: Firestore auth context utilities — waitForAuthReady, requireAuthContext. Canonical SSoT for tenant-scoped auth context resolution in Firestore service layer. Re-exported via services/firestore/index.ts. ADR-314 Phase D.3f.

address-map-config.description: Address map display configuration — ADDRESS_MAP_CONFIG, AddressMapConfig, AddressMapHeightPreset. Canonical SSoT for AddressMap component settings (height presets, zoom levels, marker visuals, animation durations). ADR-314 Phase D.3k.

admin-env.description: Server-only admin environment configuration — getRequiredAdminCompanyName, getAdminEnvConfig, getCommunicationsEnvConfig. Canonical SSoT for server-side admin env var resolution with fail-fast validation. ADR-314 Phase D.3k.

ai-tab-mapping.description: AI tab mapping prompt generator — generateTabMappingPrompt. Canonical SSoT for AI pipeline tab-routing prompt generation. ADR-314 Phase D.3k.

audit-value-catalogs.description: Audit value catalogs SSoT — AUDIT_VALUE_CATALOGS, AUDIT_CATALOG_FIELDS, getAuditValueCatalog. Canonical SSoT for audit field-to-catalog mapping (ADR-195). ADR-314 Phase D.3k.

building-ids-config.description: Building IDs configuration — BUILDING_IDS, BuildingIdUtils. Canonical SSoT for multi-tenant building identifier management sourced from env vars (zero hardcoded values). ADR-314 Phase D.3k.

connection-config.description: Connection visual configuration — CONNECTION_COLORS, CONNECTION_FALLBACK_COLOR, CONNECTION_DEFAULTS. Canonical SSoT for connection line/panel color and style tokens. ADR-314 Phase D.3l.

dev-environment.description: Dev environment helpers — getDevCompanyId. Canonical SSoT for development-only company ID resolution. ADR-314 Phase D.3l.

error-reporting.description: Error reporting configuration — errorReportingConfig, getErrorConfig, errorSeverityMapping, shouldReportError, getSamplingRate, hasUserOptedOut. Canonical SSoT for error tracker configuration (privacy, sampling, severity). ADR-314 Phase D.3l.

sentry-config.description: Sentry SDK configuration constants — SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE, SENTRY_ENABLED, SENTRY_REPLAYS_SESSION_SAMPLE_RATE, SENTRY_REPLAYS_ON_ERROR_SAMPLE_RATE. Canonical SSoT for Sentry initialization parameters. ADR-314 Phase D.3l.

seed-data-config.description: Seed data configuration — SEED_DATA_CONFIG, ENTERPRISE_SEED_CONTACTS, validateSeedConfig, shouldSeedDatabase, getSeedData. Canonical SSoT for database seeding configuration and guards. ADR-314 Phase D.3l.

async-utils.description: Async utility — sleep. Canonical SSoT for promise-based delay helper. ADR-314 Phase D.3m.

channel-icon-map.description: Channel icon mapping — getChannelIconComponent. Canonical SSoT for communication channel → Lucide icon resolution. ADR-314 Phase D.3m.

contact-link-id.description: Contact link key builder — buildContactLinkKey (alias: generateContactLinkId). Canonical SSoT for deterministic contact-link composite key generation. ADR-314 Phase D.3m.

dev-auth.description: Dev auth helpers — DEV_MODE, getDevUser, isDevelopment. Canonical SSoT for development-only auth bypass and env detection. ADR-314 Phase D.3m.

entity-formatters.description: Entity label formatters — formatBuildingLabel. Canonical SSoT for display-ready building label formatting. ADR-314 Phase D.3m.

firebaseAdmin-credentials.description: Firebase Admin credential chain helpers — sanitizeEnvJson, maskedPreview, parseServiceAccount, initializeWithCredentialChain. Split module of firebase-admin (ADR-077). ADR-314 Phase D.3n.

firebaseAdmin-types.description: Firebase Admin types — CredentialSource, AdminDiagnosticReport, FirebaseAdminInitError. Split module of firebase-admin (ADR-077). ADR-314 Phase D.3n.

toast-utils.description: Toast key generator — nextToastKey (alias: generateToastId). Canonical SSoT for sequential toast ID generation. ADR-314 Phase D.3n.

lib-utils.description: Core UI utilities — cn (classnames merger), applyUpdates. Canonical SSoT for Tailwind class merging and immutable state updates. ADR-314 Phase D.3n.

obligations-utils.description: Obligations utility aliases — validateObligation, getDocumentStats, getProgressMetrics, calculateProgress, searchInText. Canonical SSoT barrel for obligation document helpers. ADR-314 Phase D.3n.

text-utils.description: Text truncation utility — truncateText. Canonical SSoT for length-bounded string truncation with ellipsis. ADR-314 Phase D.3o.

property-utils.description: Property status/type config — getPropertyStatusConfig, PROPERTY_STATUS_CONFIG, PROPERTY_TYPE_ICONS. Canonical SSoT for property status color+label config and type icon map. ADR-314 Phase D.3o.

memory-leak-detector.description: Memory leak detection utilities — memoryLeakDetector, useMemoryTracker, withMemoryTracking, useEventListenerCleanup, enableMemoryMonitoring. Canonical SSoT for component memory leak detection hooks. ADR-314 Phase D.3o.

performance-monitor.description: Performance monitoring hooks — usePerformanceTracker, withPerformanceTracking, enablePerformanceLogging. Canonical SSoT for component render performance hooks (excludes geo-canvas PerformanceMonitor singleton). ADR-314 Phase D.3o.

firebase-client.description: Firebase client SDK singletons (db, auth, functions, storage). Canonical SSoT for client-side Firebase app initialization. ADR-314 Phase C.5.5x.

contact-form-utils.description: Contact type icon/label helpers (getTypeIcon, getTypeLabel). SSoT for ContactType display. ADR-314 Phase C.5.5x.

contact-mappers.description: Safe field accessors (toRecord/getSafeFieldValue/getSafeNestedValue/getSafeArrayValue) used by all contact form mappers. ADR-322 — regression guard for 2026-04-24 unclosed-JSDoc incident that silently returned empty form data.

contact-sanitize.description: Contact write sanitization (sanitizeContactData for CREATE, sanitizeContactForUpdate for UPDATE with explicit-clear → deleteField). ADR-323 — regression guard for 2026-04-24 bloat incident (empty default fields written on every save).

clearable-select-helpers.description: SSoT for clearable Radix Select helpers (ClearableSelectSection, shouldAllowClearForField, wrapClearableSelectHandler) used by all form renderers. ADR-324 — allows non-required selects to clear their value, writing deleteField() via ADR-323 sanitize.

esco-picker-popover.description: SSoT Popover wrapper for ESCO pickers (EscoOccupationPicker, EscoSkillPicker). ADR-325 — uses PopoverAnchor (not PopoverTrigger) so the click-toggle race that flashes a zero-height dropdown on empty input cannot reappear.

data-services.description: Sample data services (getContacts, getProjects, sampleContacts, mockProjects). Dev/test data SSoT. ADR-314 Phase C.5.5x.

enterprise-id-prefixes.description: ENTERPRISE_ID_PREFIXES constant — canonical registry of all entity ID prefix strings. ADR-314 Phase C.5.5x.

intl-utils.description: Intl utils barrel — re-exports from intl-formatting and intl-domain plus getCurrentLocale(). ADR-314 Phase C.5.5x.

company-gemi-config.description: Company GEMI fields configuration — createFieldsMap, isFieldRequired (re-exported from field-utilities). ADR-314 Phase C.5.5x.

clone-utils.description: Canonical deepClone<T> utility — JSON round-trip deep clone. ADR-212 Phase 9. ADR-314 Phase D.3n.

hq-clear-pattern.description: Canonical HQ address Clear + Undo hook. Any new implementation of useClearCompanyHqAddress, buildClearedHqEntry, or withClearedHqEntry must reuse this module. Blocks duplicated optimistic-clear logic. ADR-297.

breadcrumb-sync.description: Entity breadcrumb sync SSoT (ADR-016). All entity pages (project/building/property/space) MUST call useBreadcrumbSync() — never call syncBreadcrumb() directly. The hook encapsulates 4 resolution strategies: project (NavigationContext bootstrap-resolved name), building (NavigationContext project chain), property (hierarchy API, Admin SDK, cancellable async), space (useFirestoreBuildings + NavigationContext). Direct syncBreadcrumb() calls outside useBreadcrumbSync create duplicate resolution logic and break the single entry point guarantee. 2026-04-24.

modules._comment_adr326: === TIER 2 — ADR-326 (2026-04-25): Tenant Org Structure & Departmental Routing SSoT ===

org-structure.description: Tenant org structure + departmental email routing SSoT (ADR-326). Department codes must use DEPARTMENT_CODES constants. Email routing must go through resolveEmailFromOrgStructure/resolveTenantNotificationEmail. ACCOUNTING_NOTIFY_EMAIL env var pattern is superseded.

modules._comment_adr327: === ADR-327 (2026-04-25): Quote Management & Comparison System SSoT ===

quote-entity.description: Quote entity + FSM SSoT (ADR-327). All quote CRUD goes through quote-service.ts. FORBIDDEN: addDoc() on quotes collection, inline status transitions, direct Firestore writes from API routes.

rfq-entity.description: RFQ entity + lifecycle SSoT (ADR-327). All RFQ CRUD goes through rfq-service.ts. FORBIDDEN: direct Firestore writes from API routes.

trade-taxonomy.description: Trade taxonomy SSoT (ADR-327 §9). 32 trades / 8 groups. FORBIDDEN: hardcoded trade labels in components, inline trade lists, parallel trade enums. Use TRADE_CODES or TRADE_SEED_DATA.

vendor-portal.description: Vendor invite + portal token SSoT (ADR-327 §7, P3 fully implemented). createVendorInvite() is canonical — generates HMAC token, sends email/copy-link, writes to vendor_invites + vendor_invite_tokens. FORBIDDEN: direct addDoc on vendor_invites/vendor_invite_tokens, inline token generation outside vendor-invite-service.ts.

quote-comparison.description: Quote comparison + scoring engine SSoT (ADR-327 §8, P4 fully implemented). compareQuotes() scores all quotes per weights+templates; awardRfq() closes RFQ with winner + optional override-with-reason. COMPARISON_TEMPLATES defines 4 built-in templates. FORBIDDEN: inline scoring logic, hardcoded comparison weights, duplicate awardRfq flow.

po-auto-generation.description: Auto-PO generation from awarded quote SSoT (ADR-327 P5-ATOE). generatePoFromAwardedQuote() is the single entry point — maps quote lines to PO items, resolves VAT, calls createPO, stamps linkedPoId on the quote. FORBIDDEN: inline quote→PO mapping outside this service, duplicate award-to-PO flows.

pdf-rasterize.description: Server-side PDF→PNG rasterization SSoT (ADR-327 §6.7). rasterizePdfPages() is the single entry point — converts a PDF Buffer into per-page PNG Buffers using pdfjs-dist (legacy build) + @napi-rs/canvas. Use BEFORE sending PDFs to vision AIs (OpenAI Responses, Anthropic Vision) when documents have column-heavy or image-overlay layouts. FORBIDDEN: inline pdfjs.getDocument() in route handlers or services — always import this SSoT.

professional-role-routing.description: SSoT mapping: professional role string → DepartmentCode for L2 org-structure routing (ADR-326 Phase 6.2). mapRoleToDept() is the canonical lookup. FORBIDDEN: inline role→dept mapping outside this file.

ai-org-structure-tools.description: AI agentic tools for org structure (ADR-326 Phase 7). Canonical entry point for AI org-structure access. FORBIDDEN: AI tools that bypass resolveTenantNotificationEmail / resolveContactDepartmentEmail for routing; AI tools that read companies/{id}.settings.orgStructure or contacts/{id}.orgStructure outside the OrgStructureHandler; hardcoded department names in agentic prompts (must use DEPARTMENT_CODES).

onboarding-flow.description: Tenant onboarding state (ADR-326 Phase 8). Canonical read/write for companies/{id}.settings.onboarding. FORBIDDEN: direct Firestore writes to settings.onboarding outside onboarding-state-service; duplicating isBannerEligible / isRemindEligible logic outside onboarding-types.ts.
